releaseNotes.headline: Reset limits sync and notify
releaseNotes.summary: Version 0.2.4 refreshes Codex limits after a reset credit and tells you when a new limit is available.

highlights.title: Reset credits stay current
highlights.detail: When a reset-credit event is incomplete, usAIge immediately reads the authoritative limit instead of keeping an exhausted cached value.

highlights.title: Know when the limit resets
highlights.detail: A notification now confirms the new cycle and shows the actual percentage available, even if a little of the reset limit was already used.
